name: context-grapple-gun
description: Session learning system for Claude Code. Captures lessons as CogPRs, tracks signals via acoustic routing, promotes knowledge across scopes with human-gated review.

skills.name: cadence
skills.description: Session epoch boundary — emits canonical tic, captures lessons, writes handoff.

skills.name: review
skills.description: Review and apply Cognitive Pull Request (CogPR) promotions + Warrant triage across CLAUDE.md scopes.

skills.name: siren
skills.description: Signal emission, tick advancement, and triage dashboard for the CGG signal manifold.

skills.name: homeskillet-academy
skills.description: Interactive CGG tutorial — scaffold a workspace with 5 narrative chapters, tests, and fixtures.

hooks.description: Canonical governance runtime entrypoint — zone-root-anchored plan discovery, CogPR queue, signal scanning, parallel session awareness.
One-shot trigger gate — zone-root-anchored, spawns ripple-assessor on first prompt if handoff plan has pending CogPRs.

agents.name: ripple-assessor
agents.description: Evaluates CogPR flags and active signals/warrants from handoff plans. Writes promotion proposals.

project_files.description: Acoustic zone definition — set name to your project name, tz to your timezone.
Zone exclusion patterns — inherits from .gitignore, adds vendor/ and .claude/skills/.

install.post_install_message:
CGG installed. Four commands:

/cadence             — end of session. Saves lessons, writes handoff.
/cadence double-time — emergency exit. Minimal handoff when context is low.
/review              — every few sessions. Review proposed lessons.
/siren               — check on recurring issues.

Start working. When you're done, type /cadence.
